CVE-2021-3835.title: Buffer overflow in usb device class. Zephyr versions >= v2.6.0 co ...
CVE-2021-3835.summary: Buffer overflow in usb device class. Zephyr versions >= v2.6.0 contain Heap-based Buffer Overflow (CWE-122). For more information, see https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr/security/advisories/GHSA-fm6v-8625-99jf

CVE-2021-3861.title: The RNDIS USB device class includes a buffer overflow vulnerabili ...
CVE-2021-3861.summary: The RNDIS USB device class includes a buffer overflow vulnerability. Zephyr versions >= v2.6.0 contain Heap-based Buffer Overflow (CWE-122). For more information, see https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr/security/advisories/GHSA-hvfp-w4h8-gxvj

CVE-2022-2839.title: The Zephyr Project Manager WordPress plugin before 3.2.55 does no ...
CVE-2022-2839.summary: The Zephyr Project Manager WordPress plugin before 3.2.55 does not have any authorisation as well as CSRF in all its AJAX actions, allowing unauthenticated users to call them either directly or via CSRF attacks. Furthermore, due to the lack of sanitisation and escaping, it could also allow them to perform Stored Cross-Site Scripting attacks against logged in admins.

CVE-2024-6442.title: In ascs_cp_rsp_add in /subsys/bluetooth/audio/ascs.c, an unchecke ...
CVE-2024-6442.summary: In ascs_cp_rsp_add in /subsys/bluetooth/audio/ascs.c, an unchecked tailroom could lead to a global buffer overflow.

CVE-2024-6443.title: In utf8_trunc in zephyr/lib/utils/utf8.c, last_byte_p can point t ...
CVE-2024-6443.summary: In utf8_trunc in zephyr/lib/utils/utf8.c, last_byte_p can point to one byte before the string pointer if the string is empty.

CVE-2024-6444.title: No proper validation of the length of user input in olcp_ind_hand ...
CVE-2024-6444.summary: No proper validation of the length of user input in olcp_ind_handler in zephyr/subsys/bluetooth/services/ots/ots_client.c.
